subcodes.first_line: O Khadabakhsh! The people of the world accepted not the bounty of God and denied it when it appeared unto all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خدابخش اهل دنیا بخشش حق را قبول ننمودند و انکار کردند ظاهر شد تا کل را
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat]
